codeReview.summary: Current dashboard layout implementation matches the revised design-alignment fixes and preserves project-selection behavior expected by the feature contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The declared `vite` healthcheck only probes `/`, but the worker transcript shows port 3101 can return a blank 404 page while still passing curl connectivity checks, leaving UI validation blocked without clearer service ownership guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml:8-12 defines `healthcheck: curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3101`; handoff `2026-03-15T17-32-13-130Z__m1-dashboard-layout__091e8239-1866-449e-b82d-a45706a5c0be.json` reports `curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3101` returned 404 and browser DOM was blank.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit `4c6c63e`, transcript skeleton, tests, and shared-state docs for `m1-dashboard-layout`. The current implementation now aligns with the design-fix follow-ups: sidebar width is 280px, header only shows the page title plus a 36px avatar, navigation switches content correctly, and project selections are wired into `useModelProjects`. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were identified in the reviewed scope.
